title: EDEN event envelope
description: The envelope every event appended to an EDEN event log MUST carry. Type-specific payload shapes under data are enumerated in 05-event-protocol.md.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this event within the log.

type.description: Dotted type name, e.g. task.claimed, trial.evaluated.

occurred_at.description: When the state change happened; UTC (trailing Z) required.

data.description: Type-specific payload; shape fixed by the event's type registry.
